subject: Gastly, a ghostly gas Pokemon depicted as a large purple-black sphere with glowing eyes, surrounded by wispy dark smoke
description: A large round gaseous creature with a near-perfectly circular dark body fills most of the card art. It has two large white eyes with dark pupils and a wide mouth. The body is deepest at its center and fades outward into wispy purple-black gas tendrils that blend into the surrounding darkness. The overall color palette is deep purple and black with faint lighter outlines. The background is dark with a subtle purple glow. The art style is consistent with the Evolutions set's homage to the original Base Set illustrative style. The figure has no limbs and floats freely.
foreground: Large round gaseous dark body with glowing eyes, wispy purple-black smoke tendrils
background: Dark background with faint purple atmospheric glow
